nasb.text: Anyone, moreover, who touches his bed shall wash his clothes and bathe in water and be unclean until evening;

esv.text: And anyone who touches his bed shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.

cnv.text: 誰觸摸他的床，都要洗淨自己的衣服，用水洗澡，並且不潔淨到晚上。

ccb.text: 凡碰到他睡过的床的人都不洁净，必须洗衣、沐浴，等到傍晚才能洁净。
